title: ACTREC Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Various Telephone Operator Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies for Telephone Operator Jobs. Candidates who have qualified for any degree can apply for the ACTREC Notification 2026 . Here we have included more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
